# BRIEF

## User-Facing Goal

Reduce wasted space in the editor and make public-page access faster.

## Success Criteria

- The project page no longer has the large left-side intro panel.
- The dashboard rows include a clear view action for opening the public page.
- The public view action opens in a new tab using the project slug.

## UX Notes

- The project editor should feel more compact and direct.
- The dashboard row action should be lightweight and recognizable.

## Risks Or Tradeoffs

- The editor page still needs enough context after removing the left panel.
